summary.concern: Stephanie and Marc Felton — 34 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Good momentum — overdue count is down to 85. This is above the 7-day average of 68 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 22 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 2 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention. Credit to Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199) — cleared all overdue.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 40 days past due with 34 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **26 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $11,658 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 11 days past due with 11 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **90 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $661,222 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 28 days past due with 9 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **23 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $27,050 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** The oldest overdue task is 9 days past due with 7 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **10 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 11 days past due with 7 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **25 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 12 days past due with 6 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **11 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $16,340 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 3 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **9 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $25,531 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

249 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **202 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 15 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$717,328 in payments going out this week** across 48 tasks — make sure funds are available. $40,788 expected in from 5 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) and Ginger Brown — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 11. Keep the momentum going.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 7 overdue (oldest: 9d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **10 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 18 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 7 overdue (oldest: 11d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **25 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 34 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 3 overdue — oldest first. **9 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 15 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 4. Keep the momentum going.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 34 overdue (oldest: 40d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **26 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 32 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 4 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 8. Keep the momentum going.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 11 overdue (oldest: 11d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **90 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 90 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Ginger Brown:** 9 overdue (oldest: 28d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **23 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 35 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 6 overdue (oldest: 12d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **11 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 17 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
